steps.title: Identify the sampled group
steps.content: The $180$ people were randomly selected from people who said they liked the novel. A survey result can be generalized only to the population sampled.

steps.title: Apply the survey result
steps.content: Of the people sampled, $92\%$ disliked the television show. Since the sampled population was people who liked the novel, the appropriate inference is about people who like that novel, not all television viewers or all novel readers. The answer is D.
